ssm_range.description: Source-Specific Multicast group range(s) for this instance

rp_hash_mask_length.description: RP hash mask length for group-to-RP mapping

rp_static_override.description: Static RP entries override dynamically learned (BSR) RPs

switch_to_spt.description: Switch from the shared (RP) tree to the shortest-path tree

switch_to_spt_bytes.description: Traffic threshold in bytes before switching to the SPT

bsm_forward_back.description: Forward bootstrap (BSM) messages back out the receiving interface

crp_advertise_contained.description: Candidate-RP advertises only contained group ranges
